changeSet.author: phase5
changeSet.comment: Unify OrganizationEntity PK with auth-service UUID; drop auth_company_id mapping column
changeSet.sql: UPDATE organizations SET id = CAST(auth_company_id AS UUID) WHERE auth_company_id IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: phase5
changeSet.comment: Unify UserEntity PK with auth-service UUID; drop auth_user_id mapping column
changeSet.sql: UPDATE users SET id = CAST(auth_user_id AS UUID) WHERE auth_user_id IS NOT NULL
